docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP EMRITUS OF TOWING. DEFENDANT LE'ONDRE WALKER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, LE'ONDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED APR-12-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, LE'ONDRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-03-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, LE'ONDRE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
